title: Line 3 energy activated → experimentation = alignment
content:
Line 3 energy activated → experimentation = alignment
3:00–6:00 PMResonant PeakExecute vision, present ideas, speak
Birth time alignment. Throat defined = speak to manifest
6:00–7:30 PMSocial SparkCollaborate, brainstorm, sync with others
You become magnetic here. Seek external response.
7:30–9:00 PMCooldown / ArchiveJournal, organize outputs, light edits
Reflect & sort. Hermit energy begins returning.
9:00 PM+Emotional Digest + ResetBaths, music, decompression, ritual
Emotional authority → clarity comes before sleep
📘 [CC02] SCHEDULE ARCHETYPE: W4V-RHYTHM: MG32
🔁 FLOW MODEL
Align → Respond → Build → Share → Reset • Mornings = solo alignment
• Midday = play + test
• Afternoon = focused execution
• Evening = social activation or archival
• Night = digest emotions, restore
✨ HOW TO USE THIS
🧪 Experimental Workflow (2-week test):
• Implement time blocks in calendar or Notion
• Track:
◦ Energy (1–5) ◦ Clarity (low/med/high) ◦ Creative Output (quantified/logged) • Adjust based on emotional clarity, not mental plans
context: From document: title: "Human Design Schedule Mapping" source: "https://chatgpt.com… — chunk 8 (chunk 8/57)
